payload.answer: There is no conflict: the new memory adds another artist Sam from Goldman likes. Safe actions available are: add_new to store the Sonny Rollins preference in addition to the Bill Evans preference; keep_existing to leave only the current Bill Evans memory unchanged; edit to manually revise the memory text; or cancel to make no change.
citations: Existing memory: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.
New: Sam from Goldman also likes Sonny Rollins.

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement refers to Sam from Goldman, matching the existing memory context. The word 'also' indicates an additional preference rather than a replacement.

details: Recommended decision is add_new because the new preference does not supersede or contradict the existing preference.
